title: tenagocharis lanceolata
intro: Tenagocharis lanceolata is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tenagocharis lanceolata include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Tenagocharis lanceolata are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using it as a topical application for wound care.
